2606.25338.title: Hybrid-IR: Dual-Path Hybrid Retrieval with Iterative Reasoning for Complex Medical Question Answering
2606.25338.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promising performance across a wide range of biomedical applications, including medical question answering (QA), yet they remain prone to hallucinations and outdated knowledge. Although retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) can alleviate this issue by incorporating external documents, there still exist two fundamental limitations. First, medical knowledge is often fragmented across documents, while most RAG methods rely on a single retrieval path, which makes it challenging to jointly preserve fine-grained semantic information and structured global associations. Second, static retrieval strategies are typically insufficient to support deep reasoning that is important in complex medical QA. In this paper, we present a dual-path retrieval framework with an iterative retrieval-reasoning mechanism termed "Hybrid-IR" for complex medical QA. The proposed Hybrid-IR integrates graph-based retrieval for exploration of structured knowledge and dense retrieval for fine-grained semantic matching. Moreover, the reasoning trajectory can be progressively refined through an iterative retrieve-reason loop. Experiments on three widely used medical QA benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our Hybrid-IR.
2606.25338.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在廣泛的生物醫學應用中顯示出良好的表現，包括醫療問題回答（QA），但它們仍然容易出現幻覺和過時的知識。<lb/>儘管檢索增強生成（RAG）可以通過整合外部文檔來緩解這一問題，但仍然存在兩個基本限制。<lb/>首先，醫療知識通常分散在不同的文檔中，而大多數RAG方法依賴於單一的檢索路徑，這使得共同保留細粒度的語義信息和結構化的全局關聯變得具有挑戰性。<lb/>其次，靜態檢索策略通常不足以支持在複雜醫療QA中重要的深度推理。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一種雙路徑檢索框架，並引入了一種稱為“Hybrid-IR”的迭代檢索-推理機制，用於複雜的醫療QA。<lb/>所提出的Hybrid-IR整合了基於圖的檢索以探索結構化知識，以及密集檢索以進行細粒度的語義匹配。<lb/>此外，推理過程可以通過迭代的檢索-推理循環逐步完善。<lb/>在三個廣泛使用的醫療QA基準上進行的實驗證明了我們的Hybrid-IR的有效性。
2606.25338.author: Sheng Wan et.al.
2606.25338.authors: Sheng Wan, Jiahui Zhang, Zicheng Zhao, Shougang Ren
